query:
SELECT 
  underlying_symbol,
  COUNT(*) as trade_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN net_value_effect = 'Credit' THEN CAST(net_value AS DECIMAL(12,2)) ELSE 0 END) as total_credits,
  SUM(CASE WHEN net_value_effect = 'Debit' THEN CAST(net_value AS DECIMAL(12,2)) ELSE 0 END) as total_debits,
  SUM(CASE WHEN net_value_effect = 'Credit' THEN CAST(net_value AS DECIMAL(12,2)) ELSE -CAST(net_value AS DECIMAL(12,2)) END) as net_pnl
FROM cached_transactions
WHERE transaction_type = 'Trade'
  AND underlying_symbol IS NOT NULL
  AND underlying_symbol != ''
GROUP BY underlying_symbol
ORDER BY net_pnl DESC
LIMIT 20;
